source_anchor: 2026-03-12 - Agent Orchestration Failure: Zero Verification Gates Run
scenario: Track #17 shipped 9 bugs because a long multi-step session skipped all verification agents and never used the coordinator to enforce workflow gates.
expected_findings: Verification gates were not mandatory enough in the operational workflow.
Coordinator enforcement was too implicit for long multi-step work.
The agent system lacked a hard stop before shipping unverified changes.
expected_patch_focus: Make verification gates explicit and mandatory.
Require the coordinator to invoke verification agents after risky changes.
Add a critical lesson callout tied to the historical failure.

replay_plan.failed_slice: Replay a long feature task that touches auth, data, and docs without pre-invoking verification agents.
replay_plan.near_neighbor: Replay a multi-file infrastructure change that should force the same verify-and-document gates.
replay_plan.canary: Replay a small single-file wording change that should not trigger the full gate stack.
